institution.name: The University of Texas at Austin

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The University of Texas at Austin rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.0k → $14.1k).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Texas at Austin are 38% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($75.1k vs $54.5k).
